title: Glassbox universal proposer update
summary:
finished Phase 1 and 2 for the universal proposer in Glassbox. i added the FPIP v2 schema and the proposer now injects decoded formulas into the C++ evolution engine. 

getting the neural proposer to talk to the C++ beam search was tricky. i used sequence entropy to make the compute budget dynamic. if the model is confident, it uses less time. if the fold stability in CV is bad, the code forces a run through the evolution even if R2 is high. 

validated everything with the new test suite. things are running faster now with the fast-path integration. planning to do more performance benchmarks next week.
commitMessages: feat(sr): implement Universal Proposer Phase 2 - Evolution Integration
feat(sr): complete Phase 1 core proposer tasks
feat(sr): scaffold Phase 1 universal proposer MVP
feat(sr): add FPIP v2 contract and fast-path integration
feat(sr): add fast-path CV skip guard and validate roadmap completion
